data.title: WeatherPromise Named to TIME100 Most Influential Companies: Industry Leaders The list recognizes the world's most influential brands for their impact, innovation, and achievement
data.description: Today, WeatherPromise, a renowned global brand providing assurance for worry-free travel regardless of weather conditions, received recognition by being included in the TIME100 Most Influential Companies Industry Leaders list. This acknowledgment underscores WeatherPromise's significance in the industry and its impact on ensuring seamless travel experiences.

data.title: U-BX Technology Ltd. Announces Closing of $4.55 Million Registered Direct Offering
data.description: In Beijing, China, on April 28, 2026, U-BX Technology Ltd. (NASDAQ: UBXG) revealed the successful completion of its registered direct offering with multiple investors. The offering involved the sale and purchase of 15,166,668 Units of the Company's securities at a combined cost of $0.30 per Unit in the registered direct offering. Each Unit comprises one Class A ordinary share valued at $0.0016 per share and one warrant permitting the purchase of 0.3 of a Class A Ordinary Share. U-BX Technology Ltd. specializes in delivering AI-driven value-added services to businesses in the insurance sector, such as insurance carriers and brokers.

data.title: Amazon Earnings Preview: AI Momentum In Focus, But This Number Could Be 'Messy'
data.description: The popularity of Amazon's stock is increasing as the tech company gets ready to disclose its first-quarter earnings on Wednesday. The focus will be on the momentum of their artificial intelligence technology. However, analysts predict that a particular figure in the report might be challenging to interpret.

data.title: MYR Stock Hits A Record High Amid Sizzling Profit And Sales Growth
data.description: On Tuesday, the IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating of MYR Group increased significantly from 94 to 99. This surge comes as MYR Group's stock achieves a record high amidst remarkable profit and sales growth.

data.title: Piramal Pharma Limited Announces Results for Q4 and Full-year FY26
data.description: In Mumbai, India, Piramal Pharma Limited, a prominent global pharmaceutical, health, and wellness corporation, disclosed its financial outcomes for the Fourth Quarter(Q4) and Full-year ended on March 31, 2026. The company's stocks (NSE: PPLPHARMA | BSE: 543635) were showcased during the announcement.

data.title: CORRECTION -- Product Recall: PC® Cola
data.description: In Brampton, Ontario, on April 28, 2026, Loblaw Companies Limited has issued a voluntary recall for specific cases of PC® Cola (12 x 355 ML) with the UPC 060383787035 due to precautionary measures.

data.title: OpenAI falls behind on user and revenue targets, sparking concerns about its AI leadership in the industry. #AI #technology
data.description: The leading artificial intelligence company has supposedly failed to meet its projected user and revenue goals. This setback has cast doubt on its plans for data center expansion and initial public offering.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Wirex/
data.description: On April 8, 2026, Wirex, in collaboration with Utorg, announced an update regarding their crypto-to-card spending service for over 2 million users globally. The Wirex Banking as a Service (BaaS) now offers seamless transactions for users looking to convert cryptocurrencies to traditional card payments.

data.title: Zapata Quantum Completes Oversubscribed $15 Million Strategic Financing, Capping Successful Restructuring
data.description: Zapata Quantum recently declared the closing of a funding round worth $15 million, led by Triatomic Capital. The investment was oversubscribed and saw participation from various strategic investors. Acting as the co-lead placement agent was Odeon Capital Group LLC. This financial achievement signals a strong end to a successful year for the company, which specializes in quantum computing application and algorithm development.

data.title: Medallion Financial Corp. to Report 2026 First Quarter Results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026
data.description: A conference call has been scheduled for 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Thursday, April 30, 2026. This call is set to discuss important matters and will involve key participants from various departments. It is expected to last approximately one hour, with a Q&A session following the presentations. Participants can dial into the call using the provided conference call number and access code. The call aims to address recent developments and future plans, with a focus on achieving specific targets and milestones outlined in the agenda.

data.title: InsiteOne Announces Leadership Promotions to Accelerate AI Innovation and Operational Excellence
data.description: On April 28, 2026 in Wallingford, Connecticut, InsiteOne, a prominent company specializing in cloud-based medical imaging solutions and enterprise archiving, revealed significant leadership advancements to enhance operational efficiency and drive innovation within its product line. These promotions aim to bolster the company's strategic vision and propel growth in key areas.

data.title: Military member denies insider trading charges, allegedly made $400K on Polymarket using Venezuela intel.
data.description: A member of the special forces, Gannon Ken Van Dyke, reportedly leveraged confidential information about a Venezuelan military mission for financial gain on Polymarket, making an approximate profit of $400,000.

data.title: SIG announces expansion plan for its Querétaro plant to double production capacity in North America
data.description: SIG has announced its intention to boost production capacity at its Querétaro plant by 2028. The expansion aims to double the current capacity from 1.5 to 3 billion packs annually. This move aligns with SIG's nearshoring strategy to enhance efficiency and is projected to generate around 40 new direct jobs.

data.title: Ohio Valley Banc Corp. Reports 1st Quarter Earnings
data.description: Ohio Valley Banc Corp, based in Gallipolis, Ohio, recently disclosed their financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The Company, listed as OVBC on Nasdaq, reported a consolidated net income of $4,297,000 for the quarter, reflecting a 2.5% decrease of $109,000 compared to the previous year. Earnings per share were not provided in the summary.

data.title: Banuba Updates its AI Try-On Platform with Easier Digitization & Better Performance
data.description: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, Banuba has enhanced its AI try-on platform by introducing new product categories, improving performance, and increasing accessibility. The expansion aims to cater to a wider range of users and provide a better experience. The updated platform now covers a broader selection of products, ensuring greater versatility. Additionally, the performance upgrades enhance the overall functionality, making it more efficient. With increased accessibility, more users can now benefit from the AI try-on platform.
